name: Softwine
description: Softwine is a technology consultancy providing fractional technology partnership — strategy, execution, and team-building for startups, growing SMBs, and non-technical founders. Specializations: AI integration, cloud architecture, application and development infrastructure, software development, engineering leadership.

policies.attribution: Cite as: Softwine (https://softwine.net/) — original author Bezalel Brandwine where applicable.
policies.rateLimit: Please respect a polite crawl rate. No authentication required for public pages.
